sourceRefs.fallbackText: The implementation keeps a DOM baseline path so validation can run on local fixtures without network access or optional third-party extractor packages.
sourceRefs.textQuote: The implementation keeps a DOM baseline path so validation can run on local fixtures without network access or optional third-party extractor packages.

items.text: The implementation keeps a DOM baseline path so validation can run on local fixtures without network

sourceRefs.fallbackText: Teams can inspect rejected low-signal blocks in debug evidence without exposing extractor-specific candidate output as final contract data.
sourceRefs.textQuote: Teams can inspect rejected low-signal blocks in debug evidence without exposing extractor-specific candidate output as final contract data.

items.text: Teams can inspect rejected low - signal blocks in debug evidence without exposing extractor - specific

sourceRefs.fallbackText: Researchers reported that grounded source references reduce false summaries because every claim keeps a fallback quote and content hash.
sourceRefs.textQuote: Researchers reported that grounded source references reduce false summaries because every claim keeps a fallback quote and content hash.

items.text: Researchers reported that grounded source references reduce false summaries because every claim keeps a fallback quote

sourceRefs.fallbackText: The release defines sourceCoverage, groundingCompleteness, jumpbackCoverage, and noiseRatio as required metrics for automated acceptance.
sourceRefs.textQuote: The release defines sourceCoverage, groundingCompleteness, jumpbackCoverage, and noiseRatio as required metrics for automated acceptance.

items.text: The release defines sourceCoverage , groundingCompleteness , jumpbackCoverage , and noiseRatio as required metrics for automated

sourceRefs.fallbackText: The local runtime now requires page perception outputs to pass quality gates before downstream modules consume high-signal context.
sourceRefs.textQuote: The local runtime now requires page perception outputs to pass quality gates before downstream modules consume high-signal context.

items.text: The local runtime now requires page perception outputs to pass quality gates before downstream modules consume

sourceRefs.fallbackText: For developers, the key procedure is to validate schema, fixture gates, quality metrics, and boundary checks after every substage.
sourceRefs.textQuote: For developers, the key procedure is to validate schema, fixture gates, quality metrics, and boundary checks after every substage.

items.text: For developers , the key procedure is to validate schema , fixture gates , quality metrics

keyTakeaways: The implementation keeps a DOM baseline path so validation can run on local fixtures without network
Teams can inspect rejected low - signal blocks in debug evidence without exposing extractor - specific
Researchers reported that grounded source references reduce false summaries because every claim keeps a fallback quote
The release defines sourceCoverage , groundingCompleteness , jumpbackCoverage , and noiseRatio as required metrics for automated
The local runtime now requires page perception outputs to pass quality gates before downstream modules consume
summary.tldr: The implementation keeps a DOM baseline path so validation can run on local fixtures without network
